assertions: HighSignalPageContext validates as a public A-V1.1 contract.
PerceptionDigest validates and rejects digest items without sourceRefs.
SourceMap validates SourceRef records with fallbackText/textQuote even when selector/domPath are absent.
PagePerceptionQualityReport metrics include method, numerator, denominator, threshold, and passed fields.
CandidateExtractionResult validates as candidate-only evidence and is not exposed in final A outputs.
valid_content is allowed to pass, empty_or_low_signal must fail or degrade, and video_page_stub must not be ready.
A runtime remains isolated from ArtifactRecord, SSE, EventStore, CoreProvider, MCP, Skill, OCR, VLM, ASR, video, and live engines.
warnings: A-V1.1-0 does not implement real high-signal extraction, digest generation, source-map generation, or quality scoring.
Fixture payloads are contract samples used to freeze shape and false-green gates.

scopeBoundaries: No RAG, memory, MCP, Skill, multi-agent, browser automation, local file access, network search, voice, desktop pet, deep research, or PPT generation.
No OCR, VLM, ASR, video, or live engine execution in A-V1.1-0.
No ArtifactRecord, SSE, EventStore, Trace, D/C/B calls, or final assistant response generation from A.
